name: BudgetOperationContracts
description: Concrete versioned request, result, authority, idempotency, limit, and stable error contracts for the six public BUDGET operations plus shared contract discovery.
schema_def: All operations use the common Public Budget Operation envelope, owner or delegated authority metadata, versioned request/result/error fingerprints, deterministic limits, stable exit categories, and metadata-only diagnostics.
budget.plan.draft.create input {period, entries[], reason}; mutating, actor and idempotency required; result immutable Draft revision.
budget.plan.revision.get input {revisionId}; result BudgetPlanRevisionDetail containing immutable revision payload plus current supplemental CategoryLifecycleEvidence.
budget.plan.revision.list input {period?, status?, limit}; result bounded metadata-first revision history.
budget.plan.revision.activate input {revisionId, reason}; mutating, actor and idempotency required; result activated revision and supersession evidence.

budget.position.get input {period:{year,month,currencyCode:ZAR}, revisionId?}; selected revision must belong to the supplied period/currency or BUDGET-REVISION-PERIOD-MISMATCH is returned before LEDGER; result BudgetPosition or explicit NoActiveBudgetPlanRevision.

budget.insights.evidence.get input {budgetPeriod, revisionId?, memberLimit}; read-only; result BudgetInsightEvidence containing one immutable revision detail, canonical BudgetPosition, bounded dated actual members, shared LEDGER snapshot identity and generation, calculation schema, and binding fingerprint. The position and members reuse one complete public LEDGER actuals snapshot. An unprovable binding returns BUDGET-SOURCE-STATE-CHANGED and a limit breach returns BUDGET-RESOURCE-LIMIT before partial output.

Unknown fields, unsupported versions, invalid periods, unsafe amounts, authority failures, incompatibility, integrity failures, downstream failures, and resource limits are stable typed outcomes. No operation starts a daemon, uses network access, reads private LEDGER storage, emits financial payloads outside its business result, or grants INSIGHTS mutation authority.
